title: FLF: vsagent HTTP Beaconing
description: FreeLabFriday AdvancedC2 hunt for vsagent-style HTTP beacons: fixed User-Agent, repeated GET /beacon check-ins, and POST /beacon output submission.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ('User Agent' like '*vsagent/1.0*' or 'Request URL' like '*/beacon*') | timestats span = 1hour count as BeaconRequests by 'User Agent'

ask_ai_prompts: Does this HTTP beacon pattern show regular implant check-ins?
Pivot from the User-Agent and /beacon URI to client IP, HTTP method, and any POST output events.

references.name: Black Hills InfoSec FreeLabFriday Labs - vsagent HTTP Beaconing
